welcome: Let Team9 shape the first version of your workspace around how you actually work.

1.title: Tell us what kind of work you do
1.description: Write one sentence about your role, or start from the closest preset role.

2.title: Pick the task that feels the most real
2.description: We'll suggest a few recurring workflows that are worth automating first.

3.title: Let's prepare a few channels for you
3.description: These channels are generated from the way your work naturally flows.

4.title: Confirm your agent setup
4.description: Your main agent is fixed as Personal Staff, with a few focused helpers underneath.

5.title: Invite your team to collaborate
5.description: Share one invite link and bring everyone into the same workspace.

6.title: Choose a plan for this workspace
6.description: You can subscribe now, or continue into the workspace and set billing later.

role.inputPlaceholder: For example: I'm a B2B SaaS sales manager. My day-to-day includes following up with leads, writing proposals, running weekly deal reviews, and keeping the CRM up to date...
role.customHint: The more you describe, the better we can tailor your workspace.
role.presetsToggle: Not sure what to write? Browse preset roles for inspiration

tasks.customLabel: Or add the one workflow you most want to automate
tasks.customPlaceholder: For example: summarize daily client follow-up notes and suggest the next step.
tasks.loading: Generating task suggestions tailored to your work…

channels.renameHint: You can rename any channel directly
channels.previewLine1: This is where role-specific collaboration will start to take shape.
channels.previewLine2: When setup finishes, these channels and agents will be provisioned into the real workspace.
channels.previewPurpose: This channel is where {{topic}} stays visible and easy to action.
channels.previewInsight: {{role}} can use this space to keep {{task}} moving without losing context.
channels.previewThread: Once setup is done, follow-ups for {{task}} can stay inside {{topic}} instead of getting buried elsewhere.

agents.mainDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe how your Personal Staff should support you.
agents.empty: No usable agent setup is available yet. Go back and try again.

invite.title: Invite link
invite.hint: This link invites collaborators into the current workspace as members by default.

plan.success: Checkout completed. You can continue now.
plan.cancel: Checkout was cancelled. You can try again any time.
plan.note: You can subscribe now, or enter the workspace first and add billing later.
plan.empty: No subscription plans are available right now.

status.provisioningDescription: We're creating channels, configuring agents, and saving your preferences.
status.failedDescription: Provisioning failed partway through. You can retry without losing the preferences you've already saved.

errors.saveFailed: Unable to save onboarding progress right now.
errors.roleRequired: Add a role description or choose a preset role first.
errors.taskRequired: Select at least one task or add a custom task.
errors.channelRequired: Keep at least one channel draft.
errors.workspaceRequired: No workspace is available right now.
errors.checkoutFailed: Unable to start checkout right now.
errors.copyFailed: Unable to copy the invite link.
